Metadata.Title: God of War III Remastered
Metadata.Name: Skip Intro
Metadata.Note: Skips the initial logos. Thanks to illusion0001 aka illusionyy for the PS3 patch which made this very easy.
Metadata.Author: cuesta4

Metadata.Title: God of War III Remastered
Metadata.Name: Skip Any Video With X Button
Metadata.Note: Allows manual skipping of cinematics any cinematic with the X button. Thanks to illusion0001 aka illusionyy for the PS3 patch which made this very easy.
Metadata.Author: cuesta4
